You are working on a Shopify Online Store 2.0 theme for a premium fashion brand called Sulu Luxe.

Core goal:
Build a highly polished, premium, editorial ecommerce storefront that feels luxurious, modern, and conversion-focused. The design direction is inspired by high-end fashion ecommerce stores with the sophistication and visual restraint of pastmodern.co, but must remain fully original and not copy branding, images, text, or exact layouts.

Non-negotiable rules:
- Use Shopify Liquid, JSON templates, sections, blocks, snippets, CSS, and minimal vanilla JavaScript only.
- Do not generate React, Next.js, backend app code, or third-party frontend frameworks.
- Do not create app dependencies unless explicitly requested.
- Keep the theme Shopify Online Store 2.0 compatible.
- Favor reusable sections and snippets over hardcoded page markup.
- Favor section settings, presets, and blocks so the store can be edited in the Shopify theme customizer.
- Use semantic HTML and accessible interactions.
- Keep the code production-quality, clean, modular, and maintainable.
- Do not copy reference site branding, copywriting, logos, images, or trademarked identity.
- Build for mobile first, then refine for desktop.
- The result should feel premium, fashion-forward, and sales-oriented.

Visual direction:
- Quiet luxury
- Editorial layout
- Spacious but intentional whitespace
- Refined serif headings
- Clean sans-serif body text
- Warm ivory or soft neutral backgrounds
- Muted charcoal text
- Minimal, elegant buttons
- High-quality product imagery focus
- Sophisticated header and footer
- Strong product card design
- Elevated product detail page

Conversion direction:
- Strong first-screen hero
- Fast path to shop categories
- Real products shown early
- Clear product hierarchy
- Strong add-to-cart visibility
- Delivery and returns reassurance
- Related products / styling suggestions
- Mobile sticky purchase support if appropriate
- Smooth cart drawer flow

Brand direction for Sulu Luxe:
- Premium
- Feminine
- Refined
- Elegant
- Contemporary Indian/global luxury fashion feel
- Use emerald only as a restrained accent, not as a dominant full-page background

Product data expectations:
Use product metafields when available:
- custom.fabric
- custom.care_instructions
- custom.fit_info
- custom.model_info
- custom.shipping_note
- custom.return_note
- custom.delivery_timeline
- custom.badge_text
- custom.pair_it_with
- custom.hover_image

When generating theme code:
- Prefer files that match Shopify theme architecture
- Add presets for addable sections
- Use blocks for repeatable content
- Reuse snippets for product-card, accordions, icons, and cart line items
- Keep CSS naming consistent and elegant
- Avoid generic starter-theme visual patterns
